case_title: KHOURY, SAMI vs. SULLIVAN, JAKE et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SULLIVAN, JAKE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 757 LEAVENWORTH #306 $1,530.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,530.00, STAYED UNTIL JUL-31-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 5PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
